violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. PIC stated previous FMC has expired and is scheduled to take a class next week. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025
Peperoni was observed with white and blue fuzzy patches. PIC discarded peperoni. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025
Sliced cheese was observed with a date past the 7 days. PIC discarded. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in cooler racks have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and/or other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025
Dumpster was observed in poor repair (side panel/door broken off). New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025

The following areas have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. -storage room floors, -storage room vents, -fan/vent blades. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025

The light under the hot-hold unit and ceiling in the storage unit (peeling paint) was observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025
Prep sink located in the kitchen area was not in good repair. Service ticket has been submitted. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2024
Prep sink located in the kitchen area was not in good repair. Observed leaking from bottom pipe. New Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2024
Cans of food items were observed adulterated by rodent droppings on lids. PIC disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2023

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. PIC spoke with supervisor at time of inspection about pest control issue. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023

The door to the outside, located in the back kitchen area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2023
